title: Hi-Jacked
writer: Orville H. Hampton, Fred Myton, Raymond L. Schrock
actors: Jim Davis, Marcia Mae Jones, Sid Melton
plot: A truck driver stops on a rainy road at night to help a stranded motorist, but it turns out to be a ruse--he is attacked, knocked out and his truck stolen. Since he has a criminal record, the police immediately suspect he's involv...
